title: neopallasia yunnanensis
intro: Neopallasia yunnanensis, also known as Yunnan Prickly Rose or Yunnan Rose, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a deciduous shrub native to China, prized for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Neopallasia yunnanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine as a raw herb.
